workspacePolicy: confirm the current workspace folder, branch, latest commit, and clean status before push or PR work.
refspecPolicy: if src refspec appears, suspect the wrong workspace folder or a missing local branch before retrying push.

workspaceFolderChecks.label: Confirm the current workspace folder before push or PR work.
Confirm the current branch exists in this folder.
Confirm the latest local commit SHA.

multipleFolderDecisionRules.label: Prefer the latest Codex work/hashimoto-keiba-ai folder that contains the target branch and commit.
Do not push from an older folder unless branch, commit, and clean status are verified.
Do not push from a folder where the target branch does not exist.

pushBeforeChecks.label: Confirm working tree clean before push.
Confirm latest commit SHA before push.

srcRefspecResponse.label: If src refspec appears, suspect the wrong workspace folder first.
Check whether the target branch exists in the current folder.
Move to the latest Codex work/hashimoto-keiba-ai folder that contains the commit.
Do not solve refspec errors by pushing main.

correctCommitChecks.label: Confirm the expected commit SHA before push.
Confirm the commit is on the intended feature branch.

prohibitedActions.label: Do not push blindly from an old Codex folder.
Do not commit directly to main.
Do not make GitHub Pages required.

operationPrinciples: Multiple hashimoto-keiba-ai folders may exist, so folder confirmation is required before push or PR work.
src refspec errors often indicate that the target branch does not exist in the current folder.
Use the latest Codex work/hashimoto-keiba-ai folder that contains the intended branch and commit.
Private repository, local first, and no GitHub Pages dependency remain the operating premise.
nextRecommendedStep: Before push, confirm pwd, git branch, git status, git log --oneline -3, and the expected commit SHA in the latest work/hashimoto-keiba-ai folder.
